description.en: The<marker>SVGelement defines a graphic used for drawing arrowheads or polymarkers on a given<path>,<line>,<polyline>or<polygon>element.

description.en: The<mask>SVGelement defines a mask for compositing the current object into the background. A mask is used/referenced using themaskproperty and CSSmask-imageproperty.

excerpt.es: The<mask>SVGelement defines a mask for compositing the current object into the background. A mask is used/referenced using themaskproperty and CSSmask-imageproperty.
excerpt.en: The<mask>SVGelement defines a mask for compositing the current object into the background. A mask is used/referenced using themaskproperty and CSSmask-imageproperty.

description.en: The<metadata>SVGelement adds metadata to SVG content. Metadata is structured information about data. The contents of<metadata>should be elements from otherXMLnamespacessuch asRDF,FOAF, etc.

description.en: The<mpath>SVGsub-element for the<animateMotion>element provides the ability to reference an external<path>element as the definition of a motion path.
